name: Iran
description: A regional great power with a vast proxy network spanning Lebanon (Hezbollah), Iraq, Yemen (Houthis), and Syria, Iran can project influence far beyond its borders without direct military confrontation. Control of the Strait of Hormuz — through which 20% of global oil transits — is its ultimate economic weapon. A latent nuclear program and a massive ballistic missile arsenal give it strategic deterrence. Internal unrest from the youth population is a key vulnerability.
